references.text: Paula, OK & J Kellermann. 2022. A new species of Quintinia (Paracryphiaceae) and an overview of the genus for New Guinea. Swainsonia 36: 105-119. .

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 27 June 2021

species.citation: (Elmer) Schltr. , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 52 (1914) 125 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 220; ≡ Curraniodendron apoense (Elmer) Merr. , PJS 10c (1915) 5; ≡ Dedea apoense Elmer , LPB 2 (1910) 682; Type: Elmer 10627.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LEYTE, LUZON: Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao, Davao del Sur, Misamis Occidental, NEGROS.
species.notes: Mossy forests on the higher mountains. 1300-2286m.
